summary: Added wireframe terrain heightfield generator that produces an MxN planar grid mesh with Y-heights set by layered FBM noise (sin/cos based). Outputs flat Float32Array positions and edge pairs for LineSegments rendering. Added terrainRows/terrainCols quality fields (low: 20x30, medium: 40x60, high: 60x90) with COUNT_FIELDS scaling and terrain extractSystemConfig case. All 15 tests pass, build succeeds.
